heroHeadline: Kenya's 24-Hour Mombasa Mangrove Drive, FIFA Urban Forest Push Mark Busy Week for Reforestation
heroSubtitle: Kenya announces a Guinness-led 24-hour mangrove restoration at Tudor Creek as part of the 15 Billion Tree Programme; FIFA's World Cup 2026 partnership with the Arbor Day Foundation passes 250,000 trees across 16 North American host cities; Minnesota DNR plants 2 million spring seedlings; Amazon deforestation 2025 trend continues at historic lows.
footerNote: Data sourced from UNEP, FAO, UNCCD, IUCN, WRI Global Forest Watch, INPE, and Tier 2 science outlets. Pledge figures reflect commitments; verified restoration is substantially lower.
